name: pain-scale
title: Pain Scale
description: 0–10 numeric pain rating scale as a segmented radiogroup with descriptor anchors and optional faces.

props.name: showFaces
props.description: Show a Wong–Baker-style face for the current score.

clinicalNotes: Pain is self-reported and this score is never derived from other signals — the component only records what the patient selects. Descriptor anchors ("No pain" → "Worst possible") and the optional Wong–Baker-style faces matter for paediatric, low-literacy, and language-barrier patients, for whom a bare number is not enough. It exposes radiogroup semantics with arrow-key navigation and announces the value as text ("6 out of 10"), so the score is never conveyed by color alone. Use `readOnly` for charting historical scores. The 0–10 NRS is one instrument among several (VAS, FLACC, faces); pick the one validated for your population.
notes: medcn-original, client (controlled radiogroup with roving tabindex). Built from primitives.
